titleStmt.title: SII 9.98: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 98. (A.R. No. 232 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT SIRIVARAM, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 966, Tāraṇa, Vaiśākha, śu. 5, Bṛihaspativāra corresponding to A.D. 1044 April 5, Thursday and belongs to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalla Āhavamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I.) ruling from Poṭṭaḷakeṟe. It records that, when Traiḷōkyamalla-Nanni-Noḷaṁbādhirāja was installed, Puḷiyaṇṇa, the head of Kappekallu in Ballakunde three-hundred, and Pallavarasa, a subordinate of Odeyādityadēva made a gift of the village Kappekallu to Jyēshṭharāśi-Bhaḷāra; 8 mattars of land were given for the service of the god Mahādēva and 8 for the maṭha, in addition to a garden and an oil-mill; the land of the brahmapurī was given to Śrīdharayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakhanripakāḷātītasaṁvatsarasa
taṁgaḷoṁbha 966 neya tāraṇasaṁvatsarada vai
śākha suddha paṁcami brihaspativāra svasti samadhigatapañcamahā
śabda mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ śrīmattraiḷō
kyamalla Āhuvamalladēvaru poṭṭaḷakeṟeya bīḍina rājyaṁ prava
rdhisalu śrīmattraiḷōkyamallananninoḻaṁbādhirājargge paṭṭabandhamāge
ballakunde mūnnūṟaṟoḷagaṇa kappekallūroḍeya puḷiyaṇnaga
ḷumalli mēlāḷkeyanāḷva svastyanēkaśauryyaguṇābharaṇaṁ puruṣavi
bhūṣaṇaṁ nuḍidu tappillaṁ chalake baldāleyaṁ śvāminibhrityaṁ bhri
tyacintāmaṇi satyakānīnaṁ mārbbalasiṁga paraba ladhūmakētu hayavaThe letter ba is written above the line.
tsarāja saṁgrāmajattalaṁṭa peṟagepaḷivara peṇḍira gaṇḍa Odeyāditya
dēvapādapaṁkajabhramara śrīmatpallavarasanumiḻdu jyēṣṭarāśibha
ḷārargge kappekalla sthānamaṁ koṭṭa śāsanamentendeḍe mahādēvargge 8 ṁṭu
mattarkkiriduṁ maṭakeṁṭu mattaru Aṁtu padināṟu matta kariya keyya(ṁ)mo
ndu mattarttōṇṭamu(ṁ)mondugāṇaṣu(ṁ) mintinitumaṁ dhārāpūrvvakamācandrā
rkkaṁbaraṁ koṭṭaru brahmapurigeyyi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ śrīdharayaṁge koṭṭa kari
ya mattara 5 ydu Intinitu dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisadavar bāṇarāsi kavilenaḷida pātakaṁ .
śvadattāṁ paradattāṅvā yō harōdhi vasundharā saṣṭirvva
rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jyāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
